-- 1 of 171 --

Lords of ListBuilding

www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 171 --

Care & Feeding
of the Herd
…. suggests rounding up a herd
worth feeding and caring for.
Measuring success or value by sheer
numbers is like equating “gourmet” with
“bulk”
Size is most meaningful to those building herds
for the prime purpose of being in the list rental
business. Otherwise…
A herd that is too big can be:
•Obstacle to efficacy / message-market match
•Too expensive to “fence”
•Outright delusion
1
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 171 --

Every member of
your herd
individually and
the herd as a whole
is losing value
today unless
some things are
occurring today to
increase its value
today.
2
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 171 --

…because the
real value is
in the
relationship,
not the list.
And relationship is
A day to day thing.
3
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 171 --

Relationship Factors
AFFINITY: sense of belonging
PRIDE OF ATTACHMENT
PERSONALITY: attachment to a person
PHILOSOPHY : attachment to viewpoint, system of
ideas, values
MISSION: attachment to purpose, crusade; shared
achievement
FREQUENCY
CONSTANCY
PRESCENCE IN THEIR EVERYDAY LIVES
VALUE
DEPENDENCY
4
www.getwsodownload.com

GKIC:
1 to 4 monthly print newsl‟s* = 12 to 48
Gold Letter* 12
Gold Audio CD* 12
Diamond Letter* 12
E-Mail 3X Week+, avg.* 156
Weekly fax* 52
Books - avg. Mbr., 2 2
Blogs 12
Other online media ?
Major promotions 6
Major events 2 to 3 (1)
Catalog 1
---------------
279+
+ Local Chapters
*=constancy

your herd about …	.

relationship

research, trends, book
summaries

biographies, success
stories, pep talks

vicariously; proof

-- 42 of 171 --

Types of Lead Magnets
• 	Blind/None
• 	Report (Online or PDF)
• 	Audio (Streaming, MP3 or CD)
• 	Video (Streaming, Download, or DVD)
• 	Flowchart, Mindmap, etc.
• 	Premium/SLOs (Guitar Strings, Candle Wicks,
etc.)
• 	“Sandwich” Content
41
www.getwsodownload.com

the Sales Process

The “Sandwich Page” Is the
Answer…
52
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 54 of 171 --

Sandwich Page:
A small, easily consumed piece of
content sandwiched between the
opt-in page and the sales page.

www.getwsodownload.com

-- 61 of 171 --

This squeeze page does A LOT of things right: Good demo
video, button text, multiple opt-in boxes, solid lead magnet60
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 62 of 171 --

The call-to-action is FANTASTIC!
“Please enter your name and
email address in the form and
I’ll send you the ONE power
secret that I just used to hit it
through the plywood that will
INSTANTLY add 20 - 30 yards
to your drive...”
61
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 63 of 171 --

Areas that could be improved: Remove navigation, stronger
headline, match lead magnet offers, test orange buttons
62
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 64 of 171 --

PART 2:
Getting Your
Emails Opened
63
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 65 of 171 --

– 	Odd numbers: Why He paid Google $524,838.71…
– 	Question Marks: “Google Made Me Slap Proof?”
– 	Percentages (%): “99% of People Dieting NEED to do this”
– 	[New Video], [Video]: “[Video Blog Post] Make Your Lead
Magnet Sexy”
– 	(free report): “7 Deadly SEO Mistakes (free report)”
– 	RE: “Re: Watch me build Your Membership Site”
– 	Personal Pronouns (You, Your, etc…)
Proven Subject Lines
64
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 66 of 171 --

• 	Peak Curiosity/Confuse/Shock
– 	SUBJ: Photos Enclosed Do Not Bend
– 	SUBJ: Ryan Deiss retires?
– 	SUBJ: Forced Continuity Dishonest?
– 	SUBJ: Why I Love Hotel Bars?
– 	SUBJ: Chuckle-head does $3.8M first two years online
• 	Negative Subject Lines
– 	SUBJ: Things are bad...(maybe)
– 	SUBJ: Don't take it personally, but...
– 	SUBJ: I Hate Technology
– 	SUBJ: One word..."crazy"
More Proven Subjects…
65
www.getwsodownload.com

low-dollar and lead-gen offers.

-- 149 of 171 --

“6” Clever Ways To Build Your HERD
OFFLINE to ONLINE
By: Bill Glazer
148
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 150 of 171 --

But first….let’s talk about WHY you would want
to build your Herd from Offline to Online…
• To be able to move prospects and customers from
more expensive snail mail to INEXPENSIVE email
• To add ANOTHER MEDIA to communicate with your
prospects
• To keep your email lists CLEAN and up-to-date by snail
mailing them to go online and claim something
(anything) for them to opt-in a good email address
• To be able to tap into JV and AFFILIATE relationships
with people who ONLY have snail mail lists
• To be able to purchase SNAIL MAIL lists to grow your
herd
149
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 151 of 171 --

Snail Mail List Purchase to
Online Offer
Michael Kimble
Clever Way #1:
150
www.getwsodownload.com

www.getwsodownload.com

Steve Tingiris Mailing

-- 161 of 171 --

BOOKS
Clever Way #4:
160
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 162 of 171 --

PURLS
(Personal URLS)
Clever Way #5:
What are Purls
• A personalized web-site (URL) that is customized to the
person visiting the web site.
• The direct mail recipient logs onto the PURL
• The more that your customers believe that the
communication is especially for them…the higher the
response.
• This allows you to move a prospect or customer from a
relatively cheap offline media (a 4 X 6 inch postcard), where
you are very limited in the space for your message; to the
web, where space is virtually unlimited and (practically) free.
161
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 163 of 171 --

Aaron Scott
162
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 164 of 171 --

163
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 165 of 171 --

Rory Fatt
164
www.getwsodownload.com

McClung Companies

-- 169 of 171 --

PURL tips
• Format affects response
– FAIR……… businessgrowth.com/TomSmith
– BETTER….Tom.Smithbusinessgrowth.com
– BEST…….. Tom.Smith.BusinesGrowthSecret.com
• The MORE Curiosity On The Mailing…The BETTER
(example: From Bill’s Rusty Old Typewriter)
• Place The PURL on BOTH sides of the postcard
• Have The PURL the LARGEST and BOLDEST part of
the mailing
• In campaigns, follow-up with PURLS in emails168
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 170 of 171 --

Super-PURLS
(a.k.a. PERSONALIZED RELATIONSHIP
MARKETING)
Clever Way #6:
169
www.getwsodownload.com
